title: Seaside Road Trip
subtitle: 阿那亚度假上集：一路小插曲和漂亮民宿
moral: 旅行前细心检查物品和证件；遇到小插曲不用慌，一家人一起想办法，旅程还是会很快乐。

pages.narration: 周末旅行计划开始啦：北京 → 顺义午饭 → 北戴河阿那亚。大约300公里，大约4小时，大家要去海边住一晚漂亮民宿。

props: white SUV sticker on the route
three tiny cartoon avatar stickers: red panda, white rabbit, small white bunny
label text "约300公里 / 约4小时"

pages.composition_hint: a clean high-angle hand-drawn illustrated travel map in cartoon scrapbook style, dotted route from Beijing to Shunyi lunch stop to Beidaihe Aranya seaside destination; NO full-body animal characters on the map, only three tiny round cartoon avatar stickers/icons for the travelers: red panda, taller white rabbit, and shuishui; a small WHITE LARGE SUV sticker driving along the route, cute lunch-stop marker, sea wave and sand stickers, label text "约300公里 / 约4小时", no real navigation app UI

pages.narration: 早上，家里忙忙的。妈妈和姥姥把衣服、帽子和小点心一件件放进行李箱。

props: round orange tabby plush cat toy, soft and chubby, small round tag on its neck

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level view of shuishui holding a round orange tabby plush cat toy while a taller white rabbit and a sheep pack suitcases in a bright living room, warm morning light, all faces clear

pages.narration: 楼下，爸爸把白色大SUV开来了。车子干干净净，后排也准备好了舒服的位置。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter front view of a clean white large SUV parked downstairs, red panda standing by the open trunk, shuishui holding the orange tabby plush cat toy, taller white rabbit and sheep carrying suitcases, sunny residential courtyard

pages.narration: 装行李的时候，大家找来找去，水水的粉色小推车不见了。爸爸想起，可能上次拿露营帐篷时，把它忘在小区路边了。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 哎呀，是我太粗心了。下次我们一起检查好。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 小推车……我有一点舍不得。

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level view beside the white large SUV, red panda scratching the back of his head with an apologetic smile, shuishui holding the orange tabby plush cat toy with a small sad face, taller white rabbit and sheep standing nearby with luggage

pages.narration: 小推车暂时找不到，旅行还是要继续。大家把行李放好，也把“出门要检查”记在心里。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 有点可惜，但我们先出发。以后东西用完，要一起收好。

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter close view of shuishui hugging the orange tabby plush cat toy, a taller white rabbit standing calmly beside her, red panda closing a suitcase zipper near the white SUV, gentle expressions

pages.narration: 车子终于开到小区门口。爸爸忽然问：“身份证都带了吗？”车里一下子安静了。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level view inside the white large SUV stopped at the residential gate, red panda at the steering wheel, shuishui seated in a rear travel seat with harness holding the orange tabby plush cat toy, taller white rabbit and sheep looking surprised but playful

pages.narration: 大家又回到家里。妈妈拿身份证，姥姥检查小包，水水也认真看着。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter view of a bright entryway, a taller white rabbit placing small identity cards into a pouch, sheep checking a bag, shuishui watching carefully with the orange tabby plush cat toy, red panda waiting by the open door with a suitcase

pages.narration: 重新上路后，第一站很快到了：顺义午饭。饭店亮亮的，桌上香香的。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 给水水点了小鱼、鸭舌，还有蛤蜊萝卜丝汤。

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level view in a warm bright Chinese seafood restaurant, shuishui seated at a round table with the orange tabby plush cat toy beside her, red panda, taller white rabbit, and sheep around the table, small fish dish, duck tongues dish, clam and shredded radish soup shown in a cozy cute style

pages.narration: 吃完饭，爸爸抱着水水去买单。收银台上有圆圆的小糖果，水水的小眼睛亮了。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 可以。它是薄荷糖，先舔一小口试试。

pages.composition_hint: an over-the-shoulder view from beside the red panda holding shuishui, looking toward a restaurant cashier counter with a small bowl of round mint candies, shuishui reaching for one candy while holding the orange tabby plush cat toy, warm indoor light

pages.narration: 水水轻轻舔了一口。哇，嘴巴冰冰的！她朝爸爸吹了一口气，好像吹出一阵小小的凉风。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter close view of shuishui laughing and blowing a tiny pretend icy breath toward a smiling red panda, one small round mint candy in her paw, the orange tabby plush cat toy tucked against her arm

pages.narration: 午饭后，车子上了高速。城市慢慢退到后面，窗外有田野、树影和远远的蓝天。

props: white large SUV seen from behind

pages.composition_hint: a high-angle view from behind and slightly above a correctly shaped white large SUV driving steadily away on a clean highway, the camera follows from the rear so the passengers are not visible; show the full car exterior clearly from the back-top angle, intact roof, rear window, tailgate, rear lights, wheels, and highway lane markings; green fields and distant trees beside the road, blue sky, peaceful safe road-trip mood; no interior view, no cutaway, no visible passengers

pages.narration: 开着开着，水水睡着了。小橘猫趴在她怀里，也像一起做了一个海边梦。

props: round orange tabby plush cat toy, soft and chubby, small round tag on its neck

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level close view of shuishui sleeping peacefully in a rear travel seat with harness, hugging a soft chubby round orange tabby plush cat toy with a small round tag on its neck, gentle sunlight through the car window

pages.narration: 终于到啦！大家刚下车，就看见大姨迎面走过来。原来大姨也来一起度假。

scene_state.location: 阿那亚度假社区停车处

pages.composition_hint: from behind: shuishui in the foreground runs happily toward a white polar bear in a sky-blue summer dress walking forward with open arms; red panda, taller white rabbit, and sheep stand by the white large SUV with suitcases, bright seaside resort buildings and blue sky ahead

pages.narration: 大姨带大家来到房间。哇，是三室一厅，还有一个大院子，干净、温暖、漂亮。

dialogue.speaker: laolao
dialogue.text: 这个房子真利索，住着舒服！

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of a cozy clean vacation rental living room with pale sofa, wooden floor, green plants, glass doors to a courtyard; shuishui holding the orange tabby plush cat toy stands with red panda, taller white rabbit, sheep, and a white polar bear in a sky-blue summer dress, everyone looking delighted

pages.narration: 水水发现了儿童屋。里面有上下铺、直直的梯子，还有像太空舱一样的圆圆透明小窗。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸，快上来呀！这里是小秘密基地！

props: 圆形透明半球塑料窗口

pages.composition_hint: a low-angle view looking up at shuishui smiling from the upper bunk behind high guard rails, beside round transparent dome windows like little space-capsule portholes; red panda climbs the vertical ladder below, the orange tabby plush cat toy resting on the bunk

pages.narration: 上铺小小的，暖暖的，像一间藏起来的小屋。爸爸也爬上来，水水笑得眼睛弯弯。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 哇，这里真的像秘密基地。

props: 圆形透明半球塑料窗口

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter close view inside the upper bunk, shuishui and red panda smiling beside round transparent dome porthole windows, the orange tabby plush cat toy placed on a small pillow, cozy bedding and high guard rails visible

pages.narration: 儿童房还有一个舒服的飘窗，铺着白白软软的羊毛垫。屋顶垂下软梯和吊环，水水轻轻一蹬，就挂了一小下。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level view of a cozy playroom bay window with a white wool cushion, hanging rope ladder and gym rings from the ceiling; shuishui holds the gym rings with feet near the bay window cushion, laughing; red panda and a taller white rabbit in a yellow floral dress watch with happy faces; NO white polar bear in this scene; orange tabby plush cat toy on the cushion

pages.narration: 柜子里还藏着好多玩具。水水叫来大姨，一会儿搭积木，一会儿摆小车，小屋子里热闹起来。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter view of shuishui and a white polar bear in a sky-blue summer dress playing by a floor-to-ceiling toy cabinet filled with blocks, small toy cars, and plush toys; the orange tabby plush cat toy sits nearby, bright cheerful playroom

pages.narration: 这时，妈妈和爸爸来到小院子。长长的小院边上有花有草，左边是双人秋千椅和户外沙发，右边是餐桌和通向小区的小门。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of a long narrow courtyard in warm afternoon sunlight, flowers and grass around the edges, a two-person swing chair on the left, L-shaped outdoor sofa and square coffee table, dining table on the right, a small gate to the residential community; taller white rabbit and red panda stand in the courtyard looking relaxed

pages.narration: 妈妈坐上秋千椅，轻轻伸了个懒腰。屋里有笑声，院子里有阳光，海边假期才刚刚开始。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 今天的小插曲都过去啦，接下来好好玩。

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter medium-wide view in the sunny courtyard with ONLY TWO characters: a taller white rabbit sitting on the two-person swing chair stretching happily, and a red panda sitting relaxed on the L-shaped outdoor sofa beside a square coffee table; flowers and grass around the long narrow courtyard, warm afternoon sunlight; NO shuishui, NO sheep, NO white polar bear, no other characters
